2604.08232.title: HiRO-Nav: Hybrid ReasOning Enables Efficient Embodied Navigation
2604.08232.paper_summary: Embodied navigation agents built upon large reasoning models (LRMs) can handle complex, multimodal environmental input and perform grounded reasoning per step to improve sequential decision-making for long-horizon tasks. However, a critical question remains: \textit{how can the reasoning capabilities of LRMs be harnessed intelligently and efficiently for long-horizon navigation tasks?} In simple scenes, agents are expected to act reflexively, while in complex ones they should engage in deliberate reasoning before acting.To achieve this, we introduce \textbf{H}ybr\textbf{i}d \textbf{R}eas\textbf{O}ning \textbf{Nav}igation (\textbf{HiRO-Nav}) agent, the first kind of agent capable of adaptively determining whether to perform thinking at every step based on its own action entropy. Specifically, by examining how the agent's action entropy evolves over the navigation trajectories, we observed that only a small fraction of actions exhibit high entropy, and these actions often steer the agent toward novel scenes or critical objects. Furthermore, studying the relationship between action entropy and task completion (i.e., Q-value) reveals that improving high-entropy actions contributes more positively to task success.Hence, we propose a tailored training pipeline comprising hybrid supervised fine-tuning as a cold start, followed by online reinforcement learning with the proposed hybrid reasoning strategy to explicitly activate reasoning only for high-entropy actions, significantly reducing computational overhead while improving decision quality. Extensive experiments on the \textsc{CHORES}-$\mathbb{S}$ ObjectNav benchmark showcases that HiRO-Nav achieves a better trade-off between success rates and token efficiency than both dense-thinking and no-thinking baselines.
2604.08232.paper_summary_zh: 具身導航代理基於大型推理模型（LRMs）能夠處理複雜的多模態環境輸入，並在每一步進行基於實體的推理，以改善長期任務的序列決策。然而，一個關鍵問題仍然存在：\textit{如何智能且高效地利用LRMs的推理能力來應對長期導航任務？} 在簡單場景中，代理被期望能夠反射性地行動，而在複雜場景中，它們應該在行動之前參與深思熟慮的推理。為了實現這一點，我們引入了\textbf{H}ybr\textbf{i}d \textbf{R}eas\textbf{O}ning \textbf{Nav}igation（\textbf{HiRO-Nav}）代理，這是第一種能夠根據自身行動熵自適應決定是否在每一步進行思考的代理。具體來說，通過檢查代理的行動熵在導航軌跡上的演變，我們觀察到只有一小部分行動表現出高熵，這些行動通常將代理引向新場景或關鍵物體。此外，研究行動熵與任務完成（即Q值）之間的關係顯示，提高高熵行動對任務成功的貢獻更為積極。因此，我們提出了一個量身定制的訓練流程，包括混合監督微調作為冷啟動，隨後是使用所提出的混合推理策略進行的在線強化學習，以明確激活僅針對高熵行動的推理，顯著減少計算開銷，同時提高決策質量。在\textsc{CHORES}-$\mathbb{S}$ ObjectNav基準上的廣泛實驗顯示，HiRO-Nav在成功率和令牌效率之間達到了比密集思考和無思考基準更好的權衡。
2604.08232.author: He Zhao et.al.
2604.08232.authors: He Zhao, Yijun Yang, Zichuan Lin, Deheng Ye, Chunyan Miao
